methods.boolean canExecute():
Tests whether the application can execute the file denoted by this
 abstract pathname.
methods.boolean canRead():
Tests whether the application can read the file denoted by this

methods.boolean canWrite():
Tests whether the application can modify the file denoted by this

methods.boolean createNewFile():
Atomically creates a new, empty file named by this abstract pathname if
 and only if a file with this name does not yet exist.
methods.staticFile createTempFile(Stringprefix,S:
Creates an empty file in the default temporary-file directory, using
 the given prefix and suffix to generate its name.

Creates a new empty file in the specified directory, using the
 given prefix and suffix strings to generate its name.
methods.boolean delete(): Deletes the file or directory denoted by this abstract pathname.
methods.void deleteOnExit():
Requests that the file or directory denoted by this abstract
 pathname be deleted when the virtual machine terminates.
methods.boolean equals(Objectobj): Tests this abstract pathname for equality with the given object.
methods.boolean exists():
Tests whether the file or directory denoted by this abstract pathname
 exists.
methods.File getAbsoluteFile(): Returns the absolute form of this abstract pathname.
methods.String getAbsolutePath(): Returns the absolute pathname string of this abstract pathname.
methods.File getCanonicalFile(): Returns the canonical form of this abstract pathname.
methods.String getCanonicalPath(): Returns the canonical pathname string of this abstract pathname.
methods.long getFreeSpace(): Returns the number of unallocated bytes in the partitionnamedby this abstract path name.

Returns the name of the file or directory denoted by this abstract

methods.String getParent(): Returns the pathname string of this abstract pathname's parent, ornullif this pathname does not name a parent directory.

 directory.

Returns the size of the partitionnamedby this

methods.long getUsableSpace():
Returns the number of bytes available to this virtual machine on the

methods.int hashCode(): Computes a hash code for this abstract pathname.
methods.boolean isAbsolute(): Tests whether this abstract pathname is absolute.

Tests whether the file denoted by this abstract pathname is a

Tests whether the file denoted by this abstract pathname is a normal

Tests whether the file named by this abstract pathname is a hidden

Returns the time that the file denoted by this abstract pathname was

methods.long length(): Returns the length of the file denoted by this abstract pathname.
methods.String[] list():

 satisfy the specified filter.

 satisfy the specified filter.
methods.boolean mkdir(): Creates the directory named by this abstract pathname.
methods.boolean mkdirs():
Creates the directory named by this abstract pathname, including any
 necessary but nonexistent parent directories.
methods.boolean renameTo(Filedest): Renames the file denoted by this abstract pathname.
